axiom_schema_candidates.justification: The relation candidate "broadcast_type" explicitly states that it links a broadcast service (domain) to a broadcast modality (range). The domain hint "BroadcastService" and the description of the relation confirm this mapping, and the range hint "BroadcastType" matches the set of possible modalities such as free‑to‑air or subscription‑based.
